title: [Griffin's Keen, Topaz Point]
description: The uneven trail is almost vertical here, and keeping your balance is difficult.  The ice-covered wall of the mountain is veined with spidery cracks which might give purchase to a grasping hand.  A collection of sticks or bones is wedged into the bottom of one of the larger ones.

wayto.4576: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
wayto.4578: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northwest'
